sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 5.49 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.5)

statement.latex: Let$A_{m,n}$be the group of all automorphisms of the free soluble group of derived length$n$and rank$m$. Is it true that$A_{m,n}$is finitely generated for any$m$and$n$? every automorphism in$A_{m,n}$is induced by some automorphism in$A_{m,n+1}$? { V.\,N.\,Remeslennikov} a) No:$A_{3,2}$is not finitely generated, although$A_{m,2}$is whenever$m 3$(S.\,Bachmuth, H.\,Y.\,Mochizuki, Trans. Amer. Math. S...
